sentiment: We hold two voices at once and pour ourselves into forms that might last.

stories.title: EEG shows brain can simultaneous encode two speech streams
stories.summary: Neuroscience research reveals the brain can process two separate speech streams simultaneously, challenging assumptions about attentional bottlenecks.

stories.title: How Has Roman Concrete Lasted for Millennia? 1,900-Year-Old Latrine Offers Clues
stories.summary: A 1,900-year-old Roman latrine reveals the self-healing properties of ancient concrete, offering clues to materials that endure across millennia.
